description: Source code for a service that generates career role recommendations using AWS Bedrock (Anthropic Claude). It includes functions for building prompts, calling AWS SDK, parsing responses, and schema validation.

methods.name: _resolveModelId
methods.description: Resolves the model ID to use based on environment variables or default.

methods.name: _getBedrockClient
methods.description: Creates and returns an AWS BedrockRuntimeClient with region and maxAttempts.

methods.name: _extractClaudeText
methods.description: Extracts text content from Bedrock JSON response.

methods.name: _stripWrappers
methods.description: Removes markdown fences and Claude-specific tags from text.

methods.name: _extractFirstJsonObject
methods.description: Extracts the first top-level JSON object from a string.

methods.name: _slugifyId
methods.description: Generates a URL-friendly ID from a title.

methods.name: _asStringArray
methods.description: Converts an array of values to an array of trimmed strings.

methods.name: _clampInt
methods.description: Clamps a number within a min and max range.

methods.name: _getSchemas
methods.description: Defines and returns Zod schemas for validation.

methods.name: _buildPrompt
methods.description: Builds the prompt string for the AI model based on persona JSON and saved role.

methods.name: generateDirectTrajectoryRecommendations
methods.description: Main function to generate career role recommendations using AWS Bedrock and Claude, parsing and validating the response.
